commit.subject: LU-17620 tests: layout refresh vs group lock deadlock
commit.message:
LU-17620 tests: layout refresh vs group lock deadlock

this is a reproducer for the deadlock when the same thread helding
a grouplock needs to refresh layout.
(lfs migrate can hit this)

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I34706e4d64216b002e697e6fe371e2152583b2e7
